name: storyboard-workbench
description: Local-first storyboard workbench foundation with user-selected project directories and a versioned project schema.

interface.shortDescription: Create storyboard projects in user-selected local directories.
interface.longDescription: Storyboard Workbench extends Codex Storyboard with user-selected local project directories, a versioned project schema, safe local paths, and atomic persistence.
defaultPrompt: Create a storyboard project in my selected local directory.
